shared_properties: Counter-burst frames use 160x160 px cells and sit on the same impact center used by the projectile atlas.
Burst brightness uses the project palette plus combat feedback hex values without changing the package core palette fields.
differences: This asset delivers the eight-frame one-shot burst played on successful reflection and high-value combo moments.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Reflect success cue, combo trigger, and 160x160 effect size grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Magic flash layering and cyan-gold hit contrast grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with eight frames and despawn the entity when the non-looping animation completes.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/reflection_counter_burst_sheet.png through AssetServer and reuse the handle for all success bursts.
runtime_notes: Play at 16 fps and despawn after frame 7.
Render at z=40 above projectiles and character hands.
Peak ring radius reaches 108 px on frame 5.

context.role: Impact burst shown when a projectile is converted and sent back to the enemy.
context.usage: Spawned for Good and Perfect reflections, with combo UI layered after the burst begins.

deliverables.notes: Eight-frame one-shot burst atlas for successful reflection feedback.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 640x320 px with eight 160x160 frames arranged as 4 columns by 2 rows.
Frame 0 starts inside a 24 px radius and frame 5 reaches a 108 px radius before collapsing.
Only #00FFFF, #FFFACD, #D4AF37, #ADFF2F, and #1A1A2E are used for visible pixels.
